builds.name: Melee Bosser
builds.description: Full Bandos/Torva, Piety + Rigour relics, Kandarin + Wilderness areas. Chains GWD + Corp tasks. Best single-target DPS via Inquisitor's mace or Scythe.
builds.author: seed
notes: Start with Fire Cape before Infernal — it's the prerequisite
Barrows Gloves requires Recipe for Disaster completion
Kandarin unlocks Piety prayer and many boss tasks

builds.name: Ranged PvM DPS
builds.description: Armadyl + Twisted Bow endgame ranged setup. Excels at Chambers of Xeric and high-magic-level bosses where the bow's passive effect is strongest.
builds.author: seed
notes: Twisted Bow scales with enemy magic level — best against high-magic bosses
Armadyl set requires Armadyl GWD access
Swap twisted bow for blowpipe on low-magic targets

builds.name: Skiller / Point Farmer
builds.description: Skilling-focused build prioritising task completion for League points. Prospector + Lumberjack bonuses stack for mining and woodcutting task chains.
builds.author: seed
notes: Focus on skilling tasks first for early point lead
Graceful reduces run drain — complete rooftop courses early
Prospector helmet gives +0.4% mining XP bonus — wear for all mining tasks

builds.name: Ironmeme Pure
builds.description: Low-defence magic pure. Ancestral + occult for maximum magic damage output. Targets magic tasks and slayer with ice barrage.
builds.author: seed
notes: Magic splash tasks doable at low combat
God cape obtained from Mage Arena — requires 60 Magic
Ancestral requires Chambers of Xeric completion

builds.name: All-Rounder Starter
builds.description: Safe, accessible starter build using easily obtained gear. Balanced stats let you tackle most early tasks without specialising.
builds.author: seed
notes: Safe starting build for new players
Upgrade to Bandos when you can
Rune armour available early — no rare drops needed
